Purpose: Read-only local evidence for exact board/marketing models that are not present in pci.ids subsystem rows.

Evidence.ModelName: MSI RTX 4060 Ti Ventus 2X Black OC 16 GB

Source.Name: User-confirmed desktop GPU and TechPowerUp GPU Database page

Evidence.Notes: This is exact local board-model evidence because the desktop owner supplied the full model and matching PCI tuple. Do not generalize it to other 10DE:2803 boards.

Evidence.ModelName: ASUS Z170-A onboard Realtek ALC892 HD Audio

Source.Name: ASUS Z170-A official user manual specifications summary

Evidence.Notes: ASUS official Z170-A manual identifies the board audio codec as Realtek ALC892. The HDAUDIO tuple resolves the Realtek codec vendor and ASUS subsystem vendor locally; this entry correlates that tuple with the official board specification.
